shrububu.summary: KFC-seeking liberator of Ishiville who grows after every level.

ishiyoga.summary: Former queen of Ishiville, chained behind SRMT's throne until Shrububu frees her.

srmt.summary: Demon king ruling Ishiville from Area 111 while hoarding KFC.

poojan.summary: Local sheriff who tests Shrububu after the fake chicken building collapse.

satyaki_tirumal.summary: Shrububu's ex-husband, tormenting Divorcee Harbour over the divorce.

nitin.summary: Janitor guarding the abandoned lab and the 165-files.

deepak_reddy.summary: Monkey king mayor who forced Banana-burbs into happiness to protect it from SRMT's world.

niggesh_nishal.summary: Chef who promises fried chicken for berries and then fails to deliver.

ankit.summary: Angry because Shrububu beat his chef and disrupted his food supply.

doctor_sushan.summary: Doctor using a fictional control serum to make residents dependent on his hospital.

mitta.summary: Festival mayor who attacks after Sushan's scheme collapses.

suhas.summary: Drunk bar fighter whose bike and musical guitar become Shrububu's final tools.
